name: Birdies Indoor Golf and Cocktail Bar Long Island
about: Birdies Indoor Golf and Cocktail Bar is a 11,000 sq ft facility in Patchogue, Long Island, combining an indoor golf experience with a full-service sports bar and beer garden. The venue offers 6 state-of-the-art golf simulators and is designed for golfers of all skill levels, with amenities including PGA-certified lessons and club fittings. Birdies provides a social environment featuring one of the largest screens on Long Island for watching sports, making it a versatile destination for both golf and leisure.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulators with detailed swing data
Social atmosphere with sports bar and beer garden

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service kitchen with various food options available
Extensive drink menu including beer, wine, spirits, and cocktails

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art golf simulators with advanced sensors for detailed swing data capture

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available on-site, including TaylorMade Stealth irons for rent.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed, as the venue offers a full kitchen and bar with an extensive menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes about 2 hours, depending on your group size and pace.

faq.question: Is Birdies kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Birdies is primarily geared toward adults and is not marketed as a kid-friendly venue, focusing more on a bar and golf experience for adults.
